justification: The diff correctly migrates from Spring Boot 2/Jakarta EE 8 to Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE 9+ by updating imports (javax.* -> jakarta.*), upgrading Spring Security configuration (EnableGlobalMethodSecurity -> EnableMethodSecurity, antMatchers -> requestMatchers), and modernizing tests (JUnit 4 -> JUnit 5, MockitoAnnotations.initMocks -> openMocks). It also adds @Serial annotations for serialVersionUID fields, which is a Java 14+ feature but appropriate for Java 21. The only minor issue is the addition of junit:junit dependency which seems unnecessary since JUnit 5 is already present via spring-boot-starter-test, but this doesn't break anything. The diff is coherent and focused on the migration task.
